summary: BUILD SIGN-OFF r2 (non-authoring): all 16 fixes present and correct-for-intent; 5 folded advisories hold. C1 empirically proven (AC4 probe 8/8 DENY on secret-read verbs, 8/8 ALLOW on benign no over-block); L0 catastrophic/git-apply floors byte-unchanged (single diff hunk). A1 redaction parity across all three copies (evidence-log.sh sed == m65 fixture sed byte-identical, codex adapter re-equivalent, m65 C3 35/0). A2: --check retained, mirror-check green. A5: B2 rejects only parent-dir traversal segments, absolute ref still resolves (delegation 43/0). Frozen surface untouched; diff 19 files == scope.lock set. Green: delegation 43/0, m6 0-FAIL, m8 manifest-drift 10/0, m65 35/0, roles 19/0, linkcheck clean, mirror-check PASS. 0 blockers.

advisories_digest.statement: resolve_scope_lock_ref None maps to DELEG-SCOPE-LOCK-TRAVERSAL; also None for empty/absent ref (schema-guaranteed non-empty so ~unreachable). Fail-closed either way; cosmetic reason-code only.
build/verification evidence artifacts (create-grant) written post-signoff; human release gate must confirm AC3 committed-replica + AC5 CI-green recorded before merge.
C1 key/cert operand classes match as substrings (a benign path ending in those suffixes would deny on a read-verb); acceptable conservative over-match, no AC4 allow-set impact.

deferred_criteria.note: post-commit live-tree obligation; frozen tools untouched
